infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: JIGGO MAXXING uses the camera so you can take private scans. Photos are processed locally and never leave your device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: JIGGO MAXXING reads from your photo library so you can pick existing photos for scans. Photos are processed locally and never leave your device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: JIGGO MAXXING can save shareable cards to your photo library when you choose to export them.

plugins.photosPermission: JIGGO MAXXING reads from your photo library so you can pick existing photos for scans. Photos are processed locally and never leave your device.
plugins.cameraPermission: JIGGO MAXXING uses the camera so you can take private scans. Photos are processed locally and never leave your device.
